name: gepa-t3-d-cand2port
description: item 23.2 candidate (d) — TRANSFER the item-19 T2 winner. Ports gepa-cand2's adopted terse rules (T2 0.733→0.917) verbatim as an APPEND (rules_append → AGENTS.md), replicating the micro-suite `rules.content` append so the comparison is apples-to-apples with item 19 (NOT a system_prompt replace). Tests whether 'less is more' / the grep→read-offset discipline transfers from T2 tool-fidelity to T3 real fixes, or whether T3 is a different regime. A fresh measurement (lever-channel port), not a guaranteed carry-over. Text lever only; serving stays on the frozen local Gemma.
rules_append:
# Local Gemma coding-agent rules

- To find code: `grep` for it first to get its line number N.
- Then `read` that file with `offset = N` and `limit = 8`. Read AT line N.
- Never read a whole file; never read above the matched line.
